summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas: Zero-2-Hero w/ Fleet Rentals (PART 1)
Beyond the Horizon posted a video on how to start playing Star Atlas SAGE.
Star Atlas: Zero-2-Hero w/ Fleet Rentals (PART 2)
Beyond the Horizon posted a second video on how to start playing Star Atlas SAGE.
STAR ATLAS #269 Fleet Rentals [First Impression & Data]
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about the Star Atlas Fleet Rentals.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #170
Aephia published their latest Star Atlas newsletter.
ATMTA Announces Strategic Equity Investment in Shaga to Enhance Star Atlas Accessibility
Star Atlas published an article about their investment in Shaga.
Atlas Brew #150 – March UE5 Patch Breakdown!
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas DAO Council Election: A New Chapter in Decentralized Governance
Star Atlas published an article about the next DAO Council election.
Solana-based MMO video game ‘Star Atlas’ aiming to launch this year
The Block published an article about Star Atlas.
Latest podcast
